descriptionShort: Multiple hockey trades and signings including Dave Tomlinson to Winnipeg Jets and assignments to AHL teams.
descriptionLong: Moncton Hawks coach Rob Laird discusses acquiring centre Dave Tomlinson, who scored 84 points in 70 games with St. John's Maple Leafs, via a three-way trade involving Winnipeg Jets and Florida Panthers. The article also reports Bruce Boudreau named coach of Fort Wayne Komets, Rich Chernomaz named player/assistant coach of St. John's Maple Leafs, and veteran centre Dave Poulin signing with Washington Capitals.

attribution.headline: Tomlinson Obtained by Winnipeg Jets in Three-Way Trade
